testsuite.name: APITests.books.BooksSchemaValidation
testsuite.system-out:
Request URI: https://simple-books-api.click:443/api-clients Respuesta: {"accessToken":"91845da81ce78496d6c9bd0b57e7b45b45eb3b71958ee4f427507b2a50051254"} HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Thu, 26 Mar 2026 20:36:57 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c598e9-6070636d4d08571d41599bc8;Parent=6d4973817face9da;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: e9222868-8a34-4c32-9376-e32f0fe753f6 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a2TUkHVHIAMEjrg= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 2b3f3fcac6b134b7a6d679485a9458b4.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: LIM50-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: aHJI1GtFXkf6NqIPBsLIFytpIUBgBuf3OetQ8Aq9WUa17G9me5GYxA==
[ { "id": 1, "name": "The Russian", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 3, "name": "The Vanishing Half", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 4, "name": "The Midnight Library", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 6, "name": "Viscount Who Loved Me", "type": "fiction", "available": true }, { "id": 2, "name": "Just as I Am", "type": "non-fiction", "available": false }, { "id": 5, "name": "Untamed", "type": "non-fiction", "available": true } ] Request URI: https://simple-books-api.click:443/api-clients Respuesta: {"accessToken":"96b20959a64cbcc37cca9b13f630f425f1c9e089660c62f88200c39613a9d361"} HTTP/1.1 200 OK Content-Type: application/json Content-Length: 417 Connection: keep-alive Date: Thu, 26 Mar 2026 20:37:05 GMT X-Amzn-Trace-Id: Root=1-69c598f1-12bb69ea22cf48f53f06b233;Parent=098e93e4323c8a87;Sampled=0;Lineage=1:9ee0f5ed:0 x-amzn-RequestId: 93ff4226-591a-4be2-a3e1-4232f642d133 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Amz-Date, X-Api-Key, X-Amz-Security-Token x-amz-apigw-id: a2TVyEg1oAMEB1g= Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH X-Cache: Miss from cloudfront Via: 1.1 ac7fd017999b6d571e9b83857fbce978.cloudfront.net (CloudFront) X-Amz-Cf-Pop: LIM50-P4 X-Amz-Cf-Id: dKLhAwZdphAGmb8m__kP7yoGu5EsD9U_4dsS4OBodq_zGxBqiKLk3Q==
